subject: feat(pwa): add favicon.ico generation for legacy browser support
body:
Add 32x32 favicon.ico via manual ICO packing in generate-icons.mjs
(zero extra dependencies). Completes APP_ICONS pattern parity with
glow-props — the last missing item was favicon.ico for Windows taskbar
pinning and legacy browsers that don't support SVG favicons.

The SVG inline favicon remains the primary <link> for modern browsers;
the .ico is a fallback via a second <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon">.

Tags: pwa, icons, legacy-support
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor

title: add favicon.ico generation for legacy browser support
